{{CargoRelic
|name=Secretary's Clingfilm
|class_id=20838
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The carefully selected eternal item by the Secretary, a preservative film that resists the erosion of time, can keep the items placed within forever new. If paired with a fridge, it would be perfect...
|fame=13
|art=15
|fth=16
|civ=15
|tech=31
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5
|ss4=Snail Leadership +5
|ss7=Snail Leadership +5<br> (Awakened)
}}
